The New Islamic Center of New York (ICNY) is a non-profit, tax-exempt organization dedicated to providing Islamic education, community programs, and religious services. Located in New York, ICNY fosters spiritual growth, cultural understanding, and social responsibility for Muslims and the broader community.
Masjid Bilal Islamic Center is a beautiful new Islamic structure and home to a historic Muslim American community with over sixty years of history in the city of Los Angeles.
